events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The configuration is essentially an unvented S-trap (vertical drop immediately after the trap with no horizontal trap arm to a properly-positioned vent), which explains the reported gurgling — that's induced siphonage from the tub's discharge pulling the vanity trap's seal. This is a code violation (IPC 1002.2 / UPC 1002) with a real sewer-gas health risk, so it's marked `fail`/`risk: high`, requiring re-piping with a proper sloped trap arm to a vent within the allowed distance, plus adding a cleanout. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
